_comment: Reconciled understanding of how a personalbook role folder is STRUCTURED, so the importer never drifts from how roles are actually shaped. Rebuilt by the skill's Step 0 reconcile: read the SKILL.md of each personalbook role-structuring skill (they OWN the definition of each subfolder), then update this. Re-reconcile when personalbook's HEAD advances past reconciled_at_personalbook_commit AND the structuring skills changed. See SKILL.md 'Step 0'.

Overview.md.is: The role's front page: Core Philosophy (its WHY / reason-for-being), Key Focus Areas, Role Evolution (aliases/history), and index tables of Skills/Artifacts/Habits/Knowledge.

skills/.is: Reusable PROCESS: how the role does a thing (self-questions, method). Each skills/<kebab>/SKILL.md has a name + description + metadata.scope.
use_for: the Skills-I-use section: summarize each skill's name + description essence (transferable process only)

knowledge/.is: Declarative REFERENCE the role already knows/cites: facts, concepts, definitions, mental models (what X IS).
knowledge/.caveat: Scan per-file: a moved-from note can still name a private person/event. The leak gate is the backstop.
use_for: the What-I-know section: name the concepts/distinctions, summarize where transferable

habits/.is: Recurring PRACTICES that join skills x artifacts. Each habits/<name>/HABIT.md has name + description + frequency + Purpose + Skills Exercised + Artifacts Updated.
use_for: the Habits-I-keep section: name + cadence (frequency) + what it does, from description/Purpose

artifacts/.is: The user's PERSONAL APPLICATION: dated todos, private URLs, family/possession specifics, and the intent triad. Every artifact file carries `blog: no`.
artifacts/.rule: NEVER copy an artifact BODY into a role post. Describe the KINDS of artifacts the role produces, derived from the Overview's Artifacts-table LABELS + the skill names, not the file contents.
artifacts/.private_always_note: The intent triad (obligations = internal self-obligations; desires = wants; motivations = linked want->need). These are the hardest-private files and must never surface, even summarized.

learning cluster (artifacts/learning-pla.is: Forward-looking: what the role wants to learn NEXT (subjects, books, experiments).
learning cluster (artifacts/learning-pla.caveat: Often mixes named private mentors / specific personal resources. Treat as artifact-body private by default; only a role's generic learning THEMES are safe, and only if leak-clean.
use_for: optional: a light 'what this role is learning next' note, themes only

Responsibilities.md / Activities.md.is: Older role notes. Activities.md is the raw activity + planning-question material (the pre-structuring source).
use_for: enrich 'what the role does'; can seed a spun-off /initiatives framework post; NOT copied wholesale

private_signal_note: The leak gate scripts/validate-role-privacy.js is the fail-closed backstop for all of the above: it scans the produced role POST (not the source) for intent-triad bullets, family names, note-keeping artifacts (@done/#THOUGHT/>dates), personal Google-doc URLs, and finance/medical/immigration specifics. If personalbook grows a NEW private file-kind, add its signal there in the same reconcile.
